title: Barcelona Yacht Charter Guide: Costs, Seasons & Tips for 2026
html:
For a Mediterranean yacht charter that blends city glamour with coastal exploration, Barcelona delivers. Depart from Port Olímpic or Marina Port Vell and you can be cruising the Costa del Maresme within minutes, with bareboat motor yachts from around 600 EUR per day and crewed catamarans from 1,500 EUR. BoatHire24 offers a transparent way to find and book the right vessel for your party.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Barcelona?

Shared tours start at 60 EUR per person, a private small motorboat from 350 EUR for a half-day, and a crewed yacht from 1,500 EUR per day. Prices vary by season, boat size, and whether you include a skipper or fuel. Always compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to see exact rates before booking.

Where to set off in Barcelona

Barcelona offers multiple departure points. Port Olímpic is the closest to the city centre and has many charter companies. Marina Port Vell, just south of the old port, provides a more upmarket setting. Further north, Port Fòrum is quieter and ideal for a relaxed start. For extended cruises, many skippers are happy to pick up from Club Nàutic Sitges, a short train ride away. You can also arrange departure from Badalona or Castelldefels.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (6, 8 guests), perfect for a half-day coastal hop, from 350 EUR. Models like the Axopar 28 are popular for their sharp handling.
  2. Catamaran (8, 12 guests), stable and spacious for families, from 900 EUR for a full day. The Lagoon 42 is a common choice.
  3. Luxury yacht (6, 10 guests), for a refined experience with crew, from 1,500 EUR. Check the Azimut 58 for hire, which offers flybridge lounging and a master cabin with en suite.
  4. Sailboat (4, 8 guests), a more traditional feel, from 600 EUR per day. The Sun Odyssey 440 is often available.
  5. RIB tender (4, 6 guests), fast and fun for short trips, from 200 EUR for two hours.

Cost breakdown by trip type

  • Shared catamaran tour: 60, 100 EUR per person, includes guide and drinks.
  • Private motorboat half-day (4 hours): 350, 800 EUR, depending on size.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 900, 1,800 EUR, usually with skipper.
  • Crewed yacht with captain and host: 1,500, 3,500 EUR per day, plus fuel.

For a full explanation of deposits and cancellations, refer to the booking FAQ before finalising.

When to go and do you need a licence?

High season runs from June to September, with July and August being busiest; expect the Poniente wind in August afternoons. In Spain, a recreational boating licence (PER or PNB) is required to skipper a boat longer than 6 metres or with more than 12 hp. However, most charter operators in Barcelona offer skippered rentals so no licence is needed. Always confirm the exact requirements with the provider.

For a quieter day afloat, book a morning trip from May to early June when the sea is calm and the marina crowds are thin.

At a glance

  • Price range: 60 EUR (shared) to 3,500 EUR (crewed yacht) per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 4, 12 guests on private charters
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence: not required for crewed charters

Questions about boat rental in Barcelona

Can I rent a boat in Barcelona without a licence?

Yes, you can book a skippered charter where a local captain handles navigation, so no licence is needed.

What is the best area to cruise near Barcelona?

The coastline north towards Blanes offers rocky coves and clear water, while south to Sitges provides longer sandy beaches.

How far in advance should I book a yacht in Barcelona?

For July and August, booking at least two months ahead is wise; other months allow for 2, 3 weeks’ notice.

Are there any extra fees I should budget for?

Fuel, mooring fees, and a 2, 5% service charge are typical; check the listing for inclusive items.

Barcelona’s coastline is best explored by water, and pre‑booking your vessel through a trusted platform ensures a smooth day out. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Barcelona and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
